title: ZIKR-I BATIN
genre: Neo-Sacred Zikr / Sacred Choral Music / Neoclassical / Spiritual Music
description: A deeply personal Neo-Sacred Zikr album focused on the silent remembrance of the heart, inner reflection and the beautiful names of GOD.
story: Zikr-i Batin is one of the most personal works in the Neo-Sacred Zikr journey. Built around inner remembrance, sacred choirs, symphonic orchestration, ambient textures and modern production, the album transforms the silent zikr of the heart into a spiritual sound world.
tracks: Ya Wajid, Ya Majid, Ya Wahid, Ya Samad
Ya Mubdi, Ya Mu'id, Ya Muhyi, Ya Mumit
Ya Hannan, Ya Mannan, Dhul Jalali Wal Ikram
Ya Aziz, Ya Jabbar, Ya Mutakabbir, Ya Qawiyy
Ya Aliyy, Ya Kabir, Ya Hafiz, Ya Muqit
La Hawla Wa La Quwwata Illa Billahil Aliyyil Azim
Allahu Akbar, La Ilaha Illa Allah
Ya ALLAH, Allahu Akbar, La Ilaha Illa ALLAH

title: ZIKR RAP
genre: Neo-Sacred Zikr / Spiritual Rap / Sacred Hip-Hop
description: A sacred hip-hop album where zikr meets rap vocals, boom bap rhythms and the rhythmic language of modern spiritual expression.
story: ZIKR RAP brings the remembrance of GOD into the direct and powerful language of rap. Through rhythmic vocals, boom bap drums, sacred atmosphere and repetitions of the beautiful names of GOD, the album shows that rap can become a vehicle for submission, prayer and zikr.

title: Neo-Sacred Zikr: One God One Love
genre: Neo-Sacred Zikr / Sacred Music / Spiritual Contemporary / Choral & Ambient
description: A bright, universal and children-choir-centered sacred music album carrying the message of One GOD, One Love and One Truth.
story: Neo-Sacred Zikr: One God One Love is built around children’s choir, orchestral light, sacred atmosphere and a universal message. The album expresses belief in the ONE GOD through innocence, gratitude, peace, divine love and submission.

title: Neo-Sacred Zikr: Classical Chorus
genre: Neo-Sacred Zikr / Sacred Choral Music / Neoclassical / Spiritual Music
description: A monumental sacred choral album combining classical choir aesthetics, neoclassical orchestration, cathedral atmosphere and zikr.
story: Neo-Sacred Zikr: Classical Chorus imagines zikr through the language of grand sacred choirs. SATB choir textures, cathedral organs, neoclassical strings, liturgical harmonies and sacred space reverbs come together to glorify the beautiful names of GOD.

title: ZIKR ROCK
genre: Neo-Sacred Zikr / Sacred Rock / Progressive Rock / Neoclassical Metal
description: A powerful Neo-Sacred Zikr album where rock, metal, neoclassical guitars, cathedral organs and sacred choirs become a language of remembrance.
story: ZIKR ROCK asks one central question: what happens when rock, metal and zikr become one? The album answers with progressive structures, neoclassical guitar lines, powerful riffs, sacred choirs and a spiritual atmosphere dedicated to glorifying GOD.
tracks: Ya Hannan Ya Mennan Zül Celali vel İkram
La Havle ve La Kuvvete İlla Billahil Aliyyil Azim
Ya Rahman Ya Rahim Ya Kerim Ya Hakim

title: Zikr Nur
genre: Neo-Sacred Zikr / Ambient Spiritual Music / Sacred Meditation / Contemporary Devotional Music
description: A peaceful ambient zikr album shaped by female vocals, rain atmospheres, ney melodies and the theme of divine light.
story: Zikr Nur is one of the calmest and most meditative works in the Neo-Sacred Zikr universe. Built around remembrance, repentance, submission, rain textures, female vocal layers and soft ambient sound design, the album invites the listener into peace, reflection and divine light.
tracks: Ya Hannan Ya Mennan Zül Celâli vel İkrâm
La Havle ve La Kuvvete İlla Billah

title: Zikr Huu
genre: Neo-Sacred Zikr / Spiritual Ambient / Sacred Meditation / Contemporary Devotional Music
description: A minimalist sacred meditation album focused on repetition, female vocals and the quiet remembrance of the heart.
story: Zikr Huu is a simple and inward-looking Neo-Sacred Zikr album. Instead of musical excess, it chooses repetition, silence, soft vocals, minimal instrumentation and spiritual calmness. Its center is not performance, but the heart quietly turning toward GOD with the sound of Hu.

title: Zikr Symphony
genre: Neo-Sacred Zikr / Symphonic Sacred Music / Neoclassical / Choral Music
description: The first great manifesto of the Neo-Sacred Zikr universe, combining symphonic orchestra, choir, progressive rock and sacred remembrance.
story: Zikr Symphony is the first major concept album of the Neo-Sacred Zikr universe. Symphonic music, progressive rock, neoclassical metal, baroque choir aesthetics, church organ textures and zikr structures come together in a 19-track spiritual journey dedicated to glorifying GOD.
tracks: Eşhedü en La ilahe illallahu vahdehu la şerike leh

title: Tanrı'nın Hediyesi
genre: Neo-Sacred Zikr / Spiritual Music / Contemporary Devotional Music
description: The first Neo-Sacred Zikr work, centered on repentance, purification, forgiveness and turning toward GOD.
story: Tanrı’nın Hediyesi is the spiritual beginning of the Neo-Sacred Zikr journey. Built around the zikr Tevbe Ettim Estağfirullah Ya Gaffar, the album is a prayer of repentance, purification, forgiveness and hope in the mercy of GOD.
tracks: Zikir (Zikr) [Tevbe Ettim Estağfirullah Ya GAFFAR] (Vokal + Piano + Koro)
